---
title: Iconify in Typst
format: typst
keep-typ: true
---

## Inline icons

Heart {{< iconify octicon heart-fill-16 label="Filled heart" >}}, home {{< iconify mdi home label="House" >}}, and apple {{< iconify fa6-brands apple label="Apple logo" >}} flow inline with text.

## Sizing (Typst height)

Small {{< iconify mdi home size=0.8em label="House, small" >}}, normal {{< iconify mdi home label="House" >}}, large {{< iconify mdi home size=2em label="House, large" >}}, huge {{< iconify mdi home size=Huge label="House, extra large" >}}.

## Transforms (baked via Iconify API)

Flipped {{< iconify mdi arrow-right flip=horizontal label="Arrow pointing left" >}}, rotated {{< iconify mdi arrow-right rotate=90deg label="Arrow pointing down" >}}.

## Colour

Default {{< iconify mdi heart label="Heart" >}}, red {{< iconify mdi heart color=red label="Red heart" >}}, hex {{< iconify mdi heart color="#74aadb" label="Blue heart" >}}.

Multi-colour emoji ignores colour: {{< iconify fluent-emoji exploding-head label="Exploding head emoji" >}}.

## Quarto preset

The Quarto logo {{< quarto >}} via the `{{{< quarto >}}}` shortcode.

## Block image

{{< iconify mdi home inline=false size=3em label="House, large block icon" >}}

## Fallback

Missing icon with fallback: {{< iconify mdi no-such-icon-9999 fallback="[?]" label="Missing icon placeholder" >}}.
